# Cloud Storage & Sharing

::: {.callout-note}
## Work in Progress
This page is a placeholder. Content will be added about sessions, publishing, and cloud storage.
:::

## Overview

This page will cover how to save, publish, and share your molecular visualization stories using MolViewStories cloud storage.

## Planned Content

### Sessions vs Published Stories

**Sessions (Private)**
- What are sessions?
- Saving work in progress
- Accessing your saved sessions
- Session quotas and limits

**Published Stories (Public)**
- What is publishing?
- Publishing workflow
- Public vs private visibility
- Managing published content

### Saving Your Work

**Save Operations**
- Quick save vs save as new
- Auto-save functionality (if applicable)
- Session metadata and notes
- Version history (if applicable)

**Storage Limits**
- Sessions per user (100)
- File size limits (50MB per session)
- Total storage quotas
- Managing storage usage

### Publishing Stories

**Publishing Workflow**
1. Complete your story
2. Add metadata (title, description, tags)
3. Review and preview
4. Publish to get shareable link
5. Update or unpublish as needed

**Publishing Options**
- Public visibility
- Searchable vs unlisted
- Editing published stories
- Unpublishing content

### Sharing Options

**Share Published Stories**
- Direct URL links
- Embedding in websites
- Social media sharing
- QR codes (if supported)

**Share Session Files**
- Download session file (.mvstory)
- Share via email or file sharing
- Import session files
- Collaborative workflows

### Export Options

**File Formats**
- **JSON** - Human-readable format
- **MVStory** - Compressed session format
- **MVSX** - Mol* viewer format
- **HTML** - Standalone web page

**Export Use Cases**
- Offline presentations (HTML)
- Backup and archival (MVStory)
- Integration with other tools (MVSX, JSON)
- Self-hosting options

### Managing Your Content

**My Stories Dashboard**
- Viewing all sessions
- Viewing published stories
- Searching and filtering
- Organizing content
- Bulk operations

**Quota Management**
- Checking current usage
- Deleting old sessions
- Cleaning up assets
- Best practices for storage

### Embedding Stories

**Embed Options**
- iframe embedding
- URL parameters
- Customization options
- Responsive design considerations

**Example Code**
```html
<!-- Embedding example will go here -->
<iframe src="https://molstar.org/mol-view-stories/story/YOUR_ID"></iframe>
```

### Privacy & Security

**Data Privacy**
- Who can see your sessions?
- Who can see published stories?
- Data retention policies
- Deleting your data

**Access Control**
- Authentication requirements
- Session permissions
- Published story visibility
- Institutional access (if applicable)

## Next Steps

- [First Time Login](first-time-login.qmd) - Setting up your account
- [Building Stories](core-features.qmd) - Creating content
- [FAQ](faq-troubleshooting.qmd) - Common questions about sharing
